title: Cluster Autoscaling (Karpenter)
description: Architect cluster autoscaling solutions using tools like Karpenter for just-in-time node provisioning. Implement node provisioning that selects optimal instance types based on pod resource requests and spot-market availability.
objectives: Architect cluster autoscaling solutions using tools like Karpenter for just-in-time node provisioning.
Implement node provisioning that selects optimal instance types based on pod resource requests and spot-market availability.
